name: Doshisha Co.,Ltd.
summary: Doshisha Co.,Ltd. plans, develops, manufactures, and wholesales lifestyle-related products in Japan and internationally. The company offers lifestyle miscellaneous goods, home appliances/A&V, interior and storage supplies, watches and jewelry, brand bags, fashion accessories, gifts, food/liquor, and fashion clothing. It also provides its products through online stores. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
